title: Eva crap we have found in RL
display_title: Eva crap we have found in RL
wikitext:
[]: Eva crap we have found in RL             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Thu Jan 06, 2011 12:08 am Its the title that speaks for itself, and i'll start us off. BTW, I posted this as an incentive to get people out and looking for good stuff instead of e-baying it. If the mods don't like, plz just merge this. But keep in mind, this also helps local businesses which most comic shops are. Anyway down to business. I found these at legends in Towson. Nice secondhand place that caters to the hardcore americom nerd, but they sometimes have some gems of Japanese merchandise. @Killerbee should he see this: You may want to get a trusted individual in baltimore, say a family member, to grab that above item for you. Apparently they had a Shinji, but someone nabbed it. That made me a sad panda for a quarter hour. Then I saw these on a back shelf. The Unit-00 was in questionable condition, but the Unit-02 was flawless, and it came with not only Asuka but, drum roll please *insert drum roll*, Israfel! Nice hauls for me if I hadn't been broke. But they can be nice hauls for a Baltimore area evageek who has the money. So just post eva stuff you have found in hobby stores. Don't forget to post a name and location.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Jan 06, 2011 12:11 am I found and bought this figure at my local comic store. I also bought my Evangelion Perfect Collection DVD set off some random dude in the mall for $40, which also came with the 2004 Appleseed for free. He had been trying to sell it at Gamestop, but they wouldn't buy it because it was too old.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Thu Jan 06, 2011 12:20 am Damn you Gamestop! The only thing odd is your face(s)! Nice Sachiel too, original series I presume?

[]: That's very pink.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Thu Jan 06, 2011 12:41 am supershinjiasukashipper wrote: @Killerbee should he see this: You may want to get a trusted individual in baltimore, say a family member, to grab that above item for you. Apparently they had a Shinji, but someone nabbed it. That made me a sad panda for a quarter hour.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Thu Jan 06, 2011 12:45 am It wasn't those, they just sold a Shinji figure in particular. Crossed wires. You should see if you have friends or family over here. Either that or roadtrip it. There is a hostel in downtown Baltimore.

[]: How long does it take to get to Baltimore by bike...?             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Thu Jan 06, 2011 12:52 am supershinjiasukashipper wrote: It wasn't those, they just sold a Shinji figure in particular.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Thu Jan 06, 2011 12:54 am Hey, nobody touches my jib but me. (sadly)

[]: Lousy Smarch weather...             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Thu Jan 06, 2011 1:03 am I'll be going to MegaCon in March, so hopefully I'll find some neat Eva stuff to bring back. I've been to a couple anime cons this year but the merchandise turnout was disappointing. The last one I went to in October had basically every Eva figure that I wasn't looking for. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Thu Jan 06, 2011 4:42 am Fräulein(Name of the figure line you guys posted) means Young Lady/Ojou-sama in german. I highly doubt that they´re going to make a Shinji one.

[]:             Quote Post by Animejunkie » Thu Jan 06, 2011 4:47 am Sachi wrote: which also came with the 2004 Appleseed for free. He had been trying to sell it at Gamestop, but they wouldn't buy it because it was too old.

[]: Is "umlaut" spelled with an umlaut?             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Thu Jan 06, 2011 11:17 am InstrumentalityOne wrote: Fräulein(Name of the figure line you guys posted) means Young Lady/Ojou-sama in german. I highly doubt that they´re going to make a Shinji one.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Thu Jan 06, 2011 12:03 pm It would be nice though. Then I could fulfill my dirty little SxA related fantasies. It would be like reading plugsuit fetish 24/7. I would never get out the house.

[]:             Quote Post by shito » Fri Jan 14, 2011 8:40 pm Most of the merch I own was actually bought in the wild, back when online shopping was unknown or taboo. I have a lot more scattered around my room, probably inside boxes. here's some stuff I had handy and took a pic: [URL=http://s12.photobucket.com/albums/a240/kakuunohitobito/?action=view&current=Foto_A0008.jpg] [/URL] apart from the books, there's a Sega eva01 in berserk mode from episode 19, with the exposed arm, it also had an exchangeable no-helmet head, but it seems I lost it... the cards are part of a Sega collection, they came in a black Nerv paper, and only 1 of the cards came inside it. The Shinji one I got it from buying it at the local comic store, the other 2 (which are special cards, apparently rare) I bought from some guy at some weird event. The 2 SD keychains, I found them recently, I thought they were lost... well, the chain is lost, but that doesn't matter. I'm not sure if they are official or not... I bought them loose at the local store also, I used them a lot as actual keychains when I was 13 or so, heh. To be honest, they're one of my favorite pieces in my collection [URL=http://s12.photobucket.com/albums/a240/kakuunohitobito/?action=view&current=Foto_A0010.jpg] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Fri Jan 14, 2011 9:28 pm Found almost the entire Perfect collection at my library as well as a few platinums. Ripped them to my computer for release quality comparisons. Shit was SO cash. Borders had the DVD for 1.0 too.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sat Jan 15, 2011 4:30 am My friend bought an Asuka wallet in a store and it broke down after a week or something. Steer away from anime wallets, or just don´t use them.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Sat Jan 15, 2011 3:24 pm InstrumentalityOne wrote: My friend bought an Asuka wallet in a store and it broke down after a week or something. Steer away from anime wallets, or just don´t use them.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Sat Jan 15, 2011 3:25 pm I've been using an Asuka wallet for a year. I even lost it outside but I got it back.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Sat Jan 15, 2011 3:30 pm Personally I'm a wallet snob, I only carry black leather.

[]:             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Sat Jan 15, 2011 3:49 pm I got a NERV wallet for xmas since I needed a wallet anyway and saw this one on ebay and thought it was really fucking cool.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Sat Jan 15, 2011 3:52 pm liquidus118 wrote: I got a NERV wallet for xmas since I needed a wallet anyway and saw this one on ebay and thought it was really fucking cool.
